Off Calendar Oct-06-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Calvert Jang, Dds, Individually And Dba Jang & Associates, Only.
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Claudia W. Brisson, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Sherly Edwards, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Calvert Jang, D.D.S., individually and dba Jang & Associates.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Michael A. Arellano D.D.S. was filed on June 29, 2010.
Default against defendant Calvert Jang, D.D.S., individually and dba Jang & Associates, was filed on August 26, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 29, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Sherly Edwards, and against the Defaulted Defendant Calvert Jang, D.D.S., individually and dba Jang & Association, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $276,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived, for a total of $276,000.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Off Calendar Sep-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CALVERT JANG, D.D.S. MOTION TO LIFT ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND/OR DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Claudia W. Brisson, Esq. of Law Office of Claudia W. Brisson 924-1911 for pltf & opposing party; David R. Shane, Esq. of Shane & Taitz 464-2020 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. DEFENDANT DOES NOT PRESENT A SATISFACTORY EXCUSE FOR NOT PRESENTING A DEFENSE TO THE ACTION. NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. 1) Defendant Michael Arellano's motion to compel the attendance of plaintiff at deposition is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant to schedule the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $295 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
